bindings.label: Cut line (empty selection)
bindings.notes: Cut whole line when selection is empty, like VS Code.

bindings.label: Copy line (empty selection)
bindings.notes: Copy whole line when selection is empty, like VS Code.

bindings.label: Paste
bindings.notes: Notepad++ already matches VS Code for paste.

bindings.label: Delete Line
bindings.notes: Delete current line when selection is empty, matching VS Code behavior closely.

bindings.label: Insert Line Below
bindings.notes: Insert blank line below caret.

bindings.label: Insert Line Above
bindings.notes: Insert blank line above caret.

bindings.label: Move Line Down
bindings.notes: Move current line or selection down.

bindings.label: Move Line Up
bindings.notes: Move current line or selection up.

bindings.label: Copy Line Down
bindings.notes: Duplicate line downward.

bindings.label: Copy Line Up
bindings.notes: Duplicate line, then move duplicate upward.

bindings.label: Undo
bindings.notes: Notepad++ already matches VS Code for undo.

bindings.label: Redo
bindings.notes: Notepad++ already matches VS Code for redo.

bindings.label: Add Selection To Next Find Match
bindings.notes: Add next match to multiselection.

bindings.label: Move Last Selection To Next Find Match
bindings.notes: Skip current occurrence in multi-select flow.

bindings.label: Undo last cursor operation
bindings.notes: Undo last multi-cursor selection step.

bindings.label: Insert cursor at end of each line selected
bindings.notes: Multiple-caret insertion per line is not implemented safely in Notepad++.

bindings.label: Select all occurrences of current selection
bindings.notes: Select all current selection matches.

bindings.label: Select all occurrences of current word
bindings.notes: Approximate current-word multi-select.

bindings.label: Select current line
bindings.notes: Select current line without trailing newline.

bindings.label: Insert Cursor Below
bindings.notes: Reserved so Notepad++ defaults do not hijack VS Code multi-cursor shortcut.

bindings.label: Insert Cursor Above
bindings.notes: Reserved so Notepad++ defaults do not hijack VS Code multi-cursor shortcut.

bindings.label: Jump to matching bracket
bindings.notes: Jump to matching brace.

bindings.label: Indent Line
bindings.notes: Approximate VS Code indent with Notepad++ indent command.

bindings.label: Outdent Line
bindings.notes: Approximate VS Code outdent with Notepad++ unindent command.

bindings.label: Go to Beginning of Line
bindings.notes: Notepad++ already matches VS Code for line-home movement.

bindings.label: Go to End of Line
bindings.notes: Notepad++ already matches VS Code for line-end movement.

bindings.label: Go to End of File
bindings.notes: Jump to document end.

bindings.label: Go to Beginning of File
bindings.notes: Jump to document start.

bindings.label: Scroll Line Down
bindings.notes: Scroll without moving caret.

bindings.label: Scroll Line Up
bindings.notes: Scroll without moving caret.

bindings.label: Scroll Page Down
bindings.notes: Scroll a page without moving caret.

bindings.label: Scroll Page Up
bindings.notes: Scroll a page without moving caret.

bindings.label: Fold (collapse) region
bindings.notes: Fold current region.

bindings.label: Unfold (uncollapse) region
bindings.notes: Unfold current region.

bindings.label: Toggle Fold region
bindings.notes: Toggle fold header at caret, or nearest fold parent.

bindings.label: Fold (collapse) all subregions
bindings.notes: Reserved chord; exact recursive fold not implemented.

bindings.label: Unfold (uncollapse) all subregions
bindings.notes: Reserved chord; exact recursive unfold not implemented.

bindings.label: Fold (collapse) all regions
bindings.notes: Fold all regions.

bindings.label: Unfold (uncollapse) all regions
bindings.notes: Unfold all regions.

bindings.label: Add Line Comment
bindings.notes: Force comment selected lines.

bindings.label: Remove Line Comment
bindings.notes: Force uncomment selected lines.

bindings.label: Toggle Line Comment
bindings.notes: Toggle line-style stream comment based on current selection state.

bindings.notes: Use Notepad++ block comment command.
